title: Carved Cinnabar-Lacquer Wall Clock
condNotes: decorative charger fitted with a quartz movement
label: cinnabar wall clock
desc: A decorative charger in the classic Chinese carved cinnabar-lacquer style (qīdiāo / tìhóng), fitted with a quartz movement and gold filigree hands. Deep-relief peony branches bloom over a finely carved geometric diaper ground, framed by a scrolling border of chrysanthemum-like blooms and curling vines — peonies traditionally symbolising spring, wealth and good fortune. The technique imitates authentic carved lacquer, in which dozens of thin layers are built up and polished before carving can begin; the deep red recalls cinnabar, the brick-to-scarlet mineral once used for true lacquerwork.

title: Carved Cuckoo Clock with Maple-Leaf Motif
condNotes: wood sound; movement / working status unverified
label: cuckoo clock
desc: A traditional Black Forest–style cuckoo clock with a peaked roof, applied carved maple leaves and an Arabic-numeral dial with ornate gilt hands. Pine-cone weights hang on chains below. A handsome decorative carved case in the classic German manner.

title: Musical Chalet Cuckoo Clock with Animated Dancers
condNotes: figures and paint intact; movement, cuckoo, music and dancer function not yet tested
label: cuckoo clock
desc: A painted chalet-style cuckoo clock with a red-and-green trimmed roof, shuttered windows, a Roman-numeral dial and figural musicians flanking the base. Features a rotating dancer platform and a music-box movement — a charming, animated piece in the Alpine tradition.

title: Red Roses Floral Still-Life Oil Painting, Framed
condNotes: clean canvas; ornate gilt frame solid
label: oil painting
desc: An oil-on-canvas still life of red roses spilling from a pale vase against a soft blue-grey ground, with confident impasto brushwork. Housed in an ornate, linen-lined gold frame and signed lower right. A classic decorative floral, ready to hang.

title: Alpine Lake & Cabin Landscape Oil Painting, Framed
condNotes: bright canvas; ornate frame solid with minor gilt wear
label: oil painting
desc: An oil landscape of a log cabin beside a still mountain lake, snow-capped peaks behind and autumn-toned trees framing the scene, worked with lively palette-knife and brushwork. Set in a substantial linen-lined ornate gold frame and signed lower right. A handsome, ready-to-hang piece.

title: Winter Woodland Landscape Oil Painting — L. Cafieri
condNotes: clean surface; gilt frame with light wear
label: oil painting
desc: An atmospheric oil winter scene of snow-laden trees beside a stream under a soft pink-grey sky, with delicate snow detailing and a muted palette. Signed lower left “L. Cafieri” and housed in a gold leaf-pattern frame with a linen liner.

title: Clipper Ship Collector Plate with Gilt Rim
condNotes: clean display surface, no visible chips
label: collector plate
desc: A round ceramic display plate featuring a full-rigged clipper ship under sail on open water, rendered in soft blues and greys beneath a sunset sky and trimmed with a thin gold rim. Comes on a wall hanger, ready to display.

title: “Friendship of Salem” Red Transferware Plate — Fair Winds
era: Mid-20th c. · England (Alfred Meakin, Fair Winds pattern)
condNotes: bright transfer, no obvious crazing
label: transferware plate
desc: A classic red-brown transferware plate from the well-known Fair Winds maritime series. The centre depicts the Friendship of Salem under full sail, framed by an eagle-and-shield crest, “E Pluribus Unum,” and named harbour vignettes (Canton Port 1830 / New York Harbor 1830), all within a scalloped rim. A highly collectible American-maritime motif.

title: Bengal Tiger Wildlife Collector Plate
condNotes: vivid colour, no visible damage
label: collector plate
desc: A full-colour collector plate showing a Bengal tiger reclining among tropical ferns and a single pink orchid, in the photographic-realist style of 1980s–90s wildlife plate series. Finished with a thin gold rim and ready to wall-mount.

title: “Mayflower” Wooden Tall-Ship Model on Stand
condNotes: sails intact but aged, light rigging wear
label: model ship
desc: A wooden-hull model of the Mayflower (named on the base plaque), with three masts, cloth sails and threaded rigging over a natural-finish hull and black waterline, mounted on a turned-foot wooden stand. A decorative display model with pleasing age to the sails.

title: Wooden Model Sailing Ship on Stand
condNotes: sails aged and wrinkled, rigging tangled in spots
label: model ship
desc: A multi-masted wooden model ship with a black, white, blue and red hull lined with brass porthole rings, cloth sails and threaded rigging, on a wooden display base. A characterful decorative production model that would reward a gentle re-tidy of the rigging.

title: Wooden Model Tall Ships (Group of Three)
condNotes: sails intact but aged; rigging mostly sound
label: model ships
desc: A display grouping of wooden sailing-ship models — a large clipper with cream sails and a black-and-cream hull, a smaller “St. Thomas” model, and a flagged folk-style boat. Decorative production pieces, ideal as a nautical display lot.

title: Chinese Carved Soapstone Vases & Censer (Group)
condNotes: surface soiling and minor expected losses to the finest openwork tips
label: soapstone group
desc: A grouping of three hand-carved soapstone pieces in warm tan, honey and grey tones. Each is deeply pierced and carved in the traditional Chinese export style with chrysanthemums, foliage, fruiting branches and birds. The high-relief openwork — delicate and labour-intensive — is the hallmark of the form, and natural mineral veining runs through each stone. Offered as a decorative group.

title: Large Chinese Carved Soapstone Floral & Bird Sculpture
condNotes: light surface dust; fragile carved tips throughout
label: soapstone carving
desc: A substantial two-tone soapstone carving in russet-red and cream, depicting chrysanthemums, foliage and a perched bird rising from a heavily pierced naturalistic rootwork base. Deep openwork throughout makes it a real statement piece.

title: Chinese Carved Soapstone Group — Vase, Censer & Floral Scene
condNotes: natural surface wear; fragile carved tips
label: soapstone group
desc: A shelf grouping of grey-tan soapstone carvings: a tall pierced vase with fruiting branches, a flat-carved floral-and-bird panel, and a low bowl form. Deep openwork chrysanthemum and foliage carving runs throughout the group.

title: Economics, Finance & Politics Book Lot
condNotes: reading copies, some shelf wear
label: book lot
desc: A shelf lot of finance, economics and politics titles including Samuelson’s Economics (9th ed.), Bork’s The Tempting of America, an Idiot’s Guide to Wall Street, The Wealthy Barber and others. Offered as a themed bundle.

title: Hunting, Fishing & Outdoors Book Lot
condNotes: sound reading copies
label: book lot
desc: A shelf lot of outdoor sporting titles — Battle of the Bulge, The Art of Bird Carving, Hunting the Whitetail Deer, Complete Turkey Hunting, Ice Fishing, The Complete Hunter, Complete Bowhunting, Treasury of Angling and more. A strong themed bundle for a sportsman.

title: Mixed Bookcase Lot — Cookbooks, Children’s & General
condNotes: varies by volume
label: book lot
desc: A generous mixed-genre lot spanning instructional and tech titles, a large cookbook section and children’s books. A varied bundle best enjoyed as themed groups — cookbooks, kids and general reading.

title: Estate Smoking Pipe Collection with Wooden Rack
condNotes: Estate — honest wear, bowl char, condition varies by pipe
label: pipe collection
desc: A collection of roughly eight to ten estate pipes displayed on a turned-wood rack — a mix of briar and meerschaum-or-composite bowls with amber and Bakelite-style stems, in styles ranging from billiard to bent. All show genuine smoking wear. Offered as a lot. Please note these are previously used tobacco items.

title: Scrimshaw-Decorated Tooth Pair (Maritime Motif)
condNotes: engraving crisp
label: scrimshaw pair
desc: A pair of curved scrimshaw-style pieces engraved with sailing-ship scenes, one inscribed “H.M.S. Victory.” These are resin reproductions in the scrimshaw tradition — genuine whale-tooth scrimshaw is restricted under U.S. marine-mammal and ivory law — with crisp, detailed engraving.

title: Cigar Store Indian Figure
condNotes: bright paint; minor surface wear
label: figure
desc: A large standing cigar-store figure depicting a Native American chief in a feathered headdress, fringed tunic and beaded collar, holding a bundle. Brightly hand-painted in red, yellow and turquoise — a striking decorative advertising-style figure (a later reproduction rather than a 19th-century original).
